title: MTR Link repair
description: 本模组可以将80％的MTR3.2.2追加包用最简单粗暴的方法适到MTR4.0.3+，从此告别车厢连接处的空气或者错误方块
body:
注：模组版本1.0.0～1.0.1只能在MTR4.0.3使用，1.0.2只能在MTR4.0.4使用
Note: Module versions 1.0.0 to 1.0.1 can only be used on MTR4.0.3, and 1.0.2 can only be used on MTR4.0.4
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CN：
本模组可以将80％的MTR3.2.2追加包适到MTR4.0.3，从此告别车厢连接处的空气或者错误方块
用户交流群：1090671162

EN：This module can add 80% of the MTR3.2.2 to fit the configuration of MTR4.0 and above versions, restoring the connection points of the carriages to normal and saying goodbye to air or error blocks from now on
